gold.title: Number Flow
gold.reason: Smooth number transition with localization and formatting — dependency-free, accessible, and visually impressive for stats sections.

gold.title: Flip Countdown
gold.reason: Flip-card style countdown timer — visually dramatic and perfect for launch pages and limited-time offers.

gold.title: Stats Section
gold.reason: Full animated stats section — ready-to-drop marketing block that immediately elevates social proof sections.

gold.title: Animated Counter
gold.reason: Smooth animated counter tied to React state — polished scroll-triggered number animation for metrics sections.

silver.title: Sliding Number
silver.reason: Sliding digit animation — clean motion effect for number displays on pricing and stat sections.

silver.title: Animated Counter
silver.reason: Animated counter component — solid implementation for metrics and achievement displays.

silver.title: Count Down Numbers
silver.reason: Countdown number display — useful for event pages and limited-time promotions.

silver.title: Shuffle Number
silver.reason: Shuffling number animation — eye-catching display effect for dynamic stats.

silver.title: Number Flip Counter
silver.reason: Flip counter animation — solid number transition for metrics and countdowns.

bronze.title: Number Field 1
bronze.reason: Base UI number input field — form utility, not a display component for marketing sites.

bronze.title: 7 Segment Number
bronze.reason: 7-segment LED display style — too niche/retro aesthetic for general marketing site use.

bronze.title: Countdown Number
bronze.reason: Basic countdown number — similar to other countdown components but less feature-rich.
